rationale: In the citing paper, Bruce (2019) is cited in grouped background lists about prior Bayesian nonparametric work in marketing and in a brief note on advanced methods for nonlinear contexts. The paper does not clearly reuse, extend, or directly engage Bruce's specific modeling framework; its own method is presented as a new integration of components rather than a direct continuation of that article. Because the citation serves mainly as general methodological context without a distinct functional role tied to the cited paper, the relation is best classified as mention-only.
